stories.title: Playwright setup and configuration
acceptanceCriteria: playwright.config.ts exists with webServer config for vite+backend
npx playwright test --list shows 14 tests in 3 files

stories.title: Demo mode full flow E2E test
acceptanceCriteria: Tests enable demo mode, load floorplan, furniture, run placement
Tests verify step transitions and placement completion
Full flow reaches step 4 with Three.js canvas visible

stories.title: API health and mock endpoint tests
acceptanceCriteria: Tests verify /health, floorplan/mock, furniture/mock, placement/mock, cost/mock, placement/compute

stories.title: UI navigation and step wizard tests
acceptanceCriteria: Tests verify app loads, step 1 visible, demo toggle works
